use_cases: Primary website navigation with dropdown menus for categories or sections
Application header navigation with hover-activated submenus
E-commerce site navigation with product category dropdowns
Dashboard or SaaS application top-level navigation
Documentation or help center navigation with expandable sections
ai_summary: A composite navigation menu component built on Base UI primitives with horizontal layout and dropdown functionality. Features hover-activated submenus, keyboard navigation support, and focus-visible accessibility states. Clean, minimalist styling with smooth transitions suitable for modern web applications across various industries.
